name: local-ai-employee
description: Canonical map for the local AI worker stack.

suna.notes: Main task executor. Source repo: https://github.com/kortix-ai/suna. Chooses tools, asks for approval when needed, saves artifacts.

hermes.notes: Post-task reviewer. Source repo: https://github.com/NousResearch/hermes-agent. Summarizes outcomes and extracts playbooks.

mobileBackend.notes: Deferred for now while the core worker and approval flow are being stabilized.

androidEmulator.notes: Deferred for now until the mobile backend is back in scope.

approvalSystem.notes: Stops risky actions and asks for explicit approval.

logs.notes: Task logs, execution traces, reviewer notes, and failure details.

artifacts.notes: Files, screenshots, exports, and generated deliverables.

playbooks.notes: Reusable workflows promoted from successful supervised runs.
